name: feed
description: A scrollable list of articles, typically loaded incrementally, navigated by article rather than by individual focusable element within one.

requires.roles.article: article, one per unit of content
requires.states.posinset: aria-posinset and aria-setsize on each article, or -1 for setsize when the total is not yet known
requires.states.busy: aria-busy set to true on the feed during a multi-step update, false once it settles
requires.keyboard.PageDown: moves focus to the next article
requires.keyboard.PageUp: moves focus to the previous article
